cards.title: By the Numbers
cards.subtitle: Myagdi Livestock Water Study
cards.narration: The Myagdi livestock water study, in numbers.

cards.title: The herds of Ward Five
cards.narration: The kharkas support two hundred and twenty-two yak, and one thousand three hundred and fifty sheep and goats, across thirteen operator families.

cards.title: Design water demand  (litres per day)
cards.narration: Scheme A must deliver fifty-four thousand three hundred and thirty litres per day. Scheme B, twelve thousand nine hundred and ninety.
The combined cost is five point seven seven million rupees. The Provincial Government contributes ninety percent; the community, ten.

cards.title: Water quality  -  within NDWQS 2079
cards.narration: Every water quality parameter falls within national standards. In both springs, the E. coli count is zero.

cards.title: The water is there.
cards.subtitle: The demand is clear.  The community is ready.
cards.narration: The water is there. The demand is clear. The community is ready.
